message: br-bd-9chy.26: add stdio pipeline manifest emitter

files.patch:
@@ -32,6 +32,10 @@ path = "src/symmetry.rs"
 name = "compress-quotient"
 path = "src/compress.rs"
 
+[[bin]]
+name = "pipeline-emit"
+path = "src/pipeline.rs"
+
 [dependencies]
 serde = { version = "1.0.228", features = ["derive"] }
 serde_json = "1.0.149"
